### REQUEST ###

```
Accept-Encoding: gzip
Authorization: Bearer REDACTED
Connect-Protocol-Version: 1
Connect-Timeout-Ms: 180000
Connection: close
Content-Encoding: gzip
Content-Type: application/proto
Host: api2.cursor.sh
Traceparent: REDACTED
User-Agent: connect-es/1.6.1
X-Amzn-Trace-Id: REDACTED
X-Cursor-Checksum: REDACTED

X-Cursor-Client-Device-Type: desktop
X-Cursor-Client-Os: win32
X-Cursor-Client-Type: ide
X-Cursor-Client-Version: 2.6.12
X-Cursor-Config-Version: REDACTED
X-Cursor-Timezone: REDACTED
X-Ghost-Mode: true
X-New-Onboarding-Completed: false
X-Request-Id: REDACTED
X-Session-Id: REDACTED
```

```
{
  "1:LEN": {
    "1:I64": 4845634861506629183
  },
  "2:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "6:VARINT": 4,
  "7:LEN": [
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"gRPC detection over HTTP/2: content-type application/grpc, :path, message framing.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nimport struct\r\nfrom typing import Any\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.correlation import compute_txn_id_http2\r\nfrom netprof.models.transaction import Transaction\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.base import ProtocolHandler, ts_at_offset\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.http2 import (\r\n    HTTP2_CLIENT_PREFACE,\r\n    PREFACE_LEN,\r\n    FRAME_HEADERS,\r\n    FRAME_DATA,\r\n    _parse_frames,\r\n    _decode_header_block,\r\n)\r\n\r\nGRPC_CONTENT_TYPE = \"application/grpc\"\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _parse_grpc_path(path: str) -> tuple[str | None, str | None]:\r\n    \"\"\"Extract service and method from :path like /package.Service/Method.\"\"\"\r\n    if not path or not path.startswith(\"/\"):\r\n        return (None, None)\r\n    path = path[1:]\r\n    if \"/\" not in path:\r\n        return (None, None)\r\n    service, method = path.rsplit(\"/\", 1)\r\n    return (service or None, method or None)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _parse_grpc_message_sizes(data: bytes) -> list[int]:\r\n    \"\"\"Extract message sizes from gRPC length-prefixed framing (1 byte compressed + 4 byte length).\"\"\"\r\n    sizes = []\r\n    offset = 0\r\n    while offset + 5 <= len(data):\r\n        compressed = data[offset]\r\n        length = struct.unpack(\">I\", data[offset + 1 : offset + 5])[0]\r\n        sizes.append(length)\r\n        offset += 5 + length\r\n        if offset > len(data):\r\n            break\r\n    return sizes\r\n\r\n\r\nclass GrpcHandler(ProtocolHandler):\r\n    \"\"\"Detect gRPC over HTTP/2 and extract RPC identity and message sizes.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    @property\r\n    def name(self) -> str:\r\n        return \"grpc\"\r\n\r\n    def detect(self, c2s_bytes: bytes, s2c_bytes: bytes) -> bool:\r\n        if c2s_bytes[:PREFACE_LEN] != HTTP2_CLIENT_PREFACE:\r\n            return False\r\n        c2s_frames = _parse_frames(c2s_bytes[PREFACE_LEN:], base_offset=PREFACE_LEN)\r\n        for _sid, ft, frame, _off in c2s_frames:\r\n            if ft == FRAME_HEADERS:\r\n                block = getattr(frame, \"data\", b\"\")\r\n                headers = _decode_header_block(block)\r\n                ct = (headers.get(\"content-type\") or \"\").lower()\r\n                if GRPC_CONTENT_TYPE in ct:\r\n                    return True\r\n        return False\r\n\r\n    def parse(\r\n        self,\r\n        c2s_bytes: bytes,\r\n        s2c_bytes: bytes,\r\n        flow_id: str,\r\n        c2s_ts_map: list[tuple[int, float]],\r\n        s2c_ts_map: list[tuple[int, float]],\r\n    ) -> list[Transaction]:\r\n        if not self.detect(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes):\r\n            return []\r\n        c2s_frames = _parse_frames(c2s_bytes[PREFACE_LEN:], base_offset=PREFACE_LEN)\r\n        s2c_frames = _parse_frames(s2c_bytes, base_offset=0)\r\n        request_by_stream: dict[int, dict[str, Any]] = {}\r\n        response_by_stream: dict[int, dict[str, Any]] = {}\r\n        bytes_c2s_by_stream: dict[int, int] = {}\r\n        bytes_s2c_by_stream: dict[int, int] = {}\r\n        message_sizes_by_stream: dict[int, list[int]] = {}\r\n        for stream_id, ft, frame, offset in c2s_frames:\r\n            if ft == FRAME_HEADERS and stream_id != 0:\r\n                block = getattr(frame, \"data\", b\"\")\r\n                headers = _decode_header_block(block)\r\n                ct = (headers.get(\"content-type\") or \"\").lower()\r\n                if GRPC_CONTENT_TYPE not in ct:\r\n                    continue\r\n                path = headers.get(\":path\") or headers.get(\"path\") or \"\"\r\n                service, method = _parse_grpc_path(path)\r\n                request_by_stream[stream_id] = {\r\n                    \"offset\": offset,\r\n                    \"method\": headers.get(\":method\"),\r\n                    \"path\": path,\r\n                    \"authority\": headers.get(\":authority\"),\r\n                    \"service\": service,\r\n                    \"method\": method,\r\n                }\r\n            elif ft == FRAME_DATA:\r\n                data = getattr(frame, \"data\", b\"\")\r\n                bytes_c2s_by_stream[stream_id] = bytes_c2s_by_stream.get(stream_id, 0) + len(data)\r\n                sizes = _parse_grpc_message_sizes(data)\r\n                message_sizes_by_stream.setdefault(stream_id, []).extend(sizes)\r\n        for stream_id, ft, frame, offset in s2c_frames:\r\n            if ft == FRAME_HEADERS and stream_id != 0:\r\n                block = getattr(frame, \"data\", b\"\")\r\n                headers = _decode_header_block(block)\r\n                ct = (headers.get(\"content-type\") or \"\").lower()\r\n                if GRPC_CONTENT_TYPE not in ct:\r\n                    continue\r\n                path = headers.get(\":path\") or \"\"\r\n                service, method = _parse_grpc_path(path)\r\n                try:\r\n                    status_code = int(headers.get(\":status\") or headers.get(\"status\", \"0\"))\r\n                except ValueError:\r\n                    status_code = None\r\n                response_by_stream[stream_id] = {\r\n                    \"offset\": offset,\r\n                    \"status_code\": status_code,\r\n                    \"service\": service,\r\n                    \"method\": method,\r\n                }\r\n            elif ft == FRAME_DATA:\r\n                data = getattr(frame, \"data\", b\"\")\r\n                bytes_s2c_by_stream[stream_id] = bytes_s2c_by_stream.get(stream_id, 0) + len(data)\r\n                sizes = _parse_grpc_message_sizes(data)\r\n                message_sizes_by_stream.setdefault(stream_id, []).extend(sizes)\r\n        transactions = []\r\n        for stream_id in sorted(set(request_by_stream) | set(response_by_stream)):\r\n            if stream_id == 0:\r\n                continue\r\n            req = request_by_stream.get(stream_id, {})\r\n            resp = response_by_stream.get(stream_id, {})\r\n            service = req.get(\"service\") or resp.get(\"service\")\r\n            method = req.get(\"method\") or resp.get(\"method\")\r\n            req_offset = req.get(\"offset\", 0)\r\n            resp_offset = resp.get(\"offset\", 0)\r\n            request_ts = ts_at_offset(req_offset, c2s_ts_map)\r\n            response_ts = ts_at_offset(resp_offset, s2c_ts_map)\r\n            latency_ms = None\r\n            if request_ts is not None and response_ts is not None:\r\n                latency_ms = (response_ts - request_ts) * 1000.0\r\n            txn_id = compute_txn_id_http2(flow_id, stream_id)\r\n            transactions.append(\r\n                Transaction(\r\n                    txn_id=txn_id,\r\n                    flow_id=flow_id,\r\n                    protocol=\"grpc\",\r\n                    method=req.get(\"method\"),\r\n                    authority=req.get(\"authority\"),\r\n                    path=req.get(\"path\"),\r\n                    status_code=resp.get(\"status_code\"),\r\n                    stream_id=stream_id,\r\n                    request_ts=request_ts,\r\n                    response_ts=response_ts,\r\n                    end_ts=response_ts,\r\n                    latency_ms=latency_ms,\r\n                    request_bytes=bytes_c2s_by_stream.get(stream_id, 0),\r\n                    response_bytes=bytes_s2c_by_stream.get(stream_id, 0),\r\n                    grpc_service=service,\r\n                    grpc_method=method,\r\n                    message_sizes=message_sizes_by_stream.get(stream_id),\r\n                )\r\n            )\r\n        return transactions\r\n"
        },

    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Centralized error logging to errors.log in output directory.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\nfrom typing import TextIO\r\n\r\n\r\nclass ErrorLogger:\r\n    \"\"\"Append parse errors and warnings to errors.log.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    def __init__(self, output_dir: Path) -> None:\r\n        self._output_dir = Path(output_dir)\r\n        self._file: TextIO | None = None\r\n\r\n    def _ensure_open(self) -> TextIO:\r\n        if self._file is None:\r\n            path = self._output_dir / \"errors.log\"\r\n            self._file = open(path, \"a\", encoding=\"utf-8\")\r\n        return self._file\r\n\r\n    def log(self, message: str, flow_id: str | None = None, detail: str | None = None) -> None:\r\n        line = message\r\n        if flow_id:\r\n            line += f\" [flow_id={flow_id}]\"\r\n        if detail:\r\n            line += f\" {detail}\"\r\n        self._ensure_open().write(line.rstrip() + \"\\n\")\r\n        self._ensure_open().flush()\r\n\r\n    def close(self) -> None:\r\n        if self._file is not None:\r\n            self._file.close()\r\n            self._file = None\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "bf246c4e416fd9831953aa34af2283924ec99c7acd7779c4cb29829d1cf1f53d",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Generate human-readable profile.md report.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.models.summary import Summary\r\nfrom netprof.models.transaction import Transaction\r\n\r\n\r\ndef build_profile_md(summary: Summary, transactions: list[Transaction]) -> str:\r\n    \"\"\"Build markdown report with overview, tables, and behavior profile.\"\"\"\r\n    lines = [\"# Network Behavior Profile\", \"\"]\r\n\r\n    # Overview\r\n    lines.append(\"## Overview\")\r\n    lines.append(\"\")\r\n    lines.append(f\"- **Total flows:** {summary.total_flows}\")\r\n    lines.append(f\"- **Total bytes:** {summary.total_bytes}\")\r\n    lines.append(f\"- **Parsed transactions (HTTP/gRPC):** {summary.total_transactions}\")\r\n    lines.append(f\"- **Active flow peak (concurrent):** {summary.active_flow_peaks}\")\r\n    lines.append(\"\")\r\n\r\n    # Top endpoints (from transactions: path + method)\r\n    if transactions:\r\n        endpoint_counts: dict[str, int] = {}\r\n        for t in transactions:\r\n            key = f\"{t.method or '?'} {t.path or '?'}\"\r\n            endpoint_counts[key] = endpoint_counts.get(key, 0) + 1\r\n        sorted_endpoints = sorted(endpoint_counts.items(), key=lambda x: -x[1])[:15]\r\n        lines.append(\"## Top Endpoints\")\r\n        lines.append(\"\")\r\n        lines.append(\"| Method | Path | Count |\")\r\n        lines.append(\"|--------|------|-------|\")\r\n        for (method_path, count) in sorted_endpoints:\r\n            parts = method_path.split(\" \", 1)\r\n            method = parts[0]\r\n            path = parts[1] if len(parts) > 1 else \"\"\r\n            lines.append(f\"| {method} | {path} | {count} |\")\r\n        lines.append(\"\")\r\n\r\n        # Status codes\r\n        status_counts: dict[int, int] = {}\r\n        for t in transactions:\r\n            if t.status_code is not None:\r\n                status_counts[t.status_code] = status_counts.get(t.status_code, 0) + 1\r\n        if status_counts:\r\n            lines.append(\"## Status Codes\")\r\n            lines.append(\"\")\r\n            lines.append(\"| Code | Count |\")\r\n            lines.append(\"|------|-------|\")\r\n            for code, count in sorted(status_counts.items(), key=lambda x: -x[1]):\r\n                lines.append(f\"| {code} | {count} |\")\r\n            lines.append(\"\")\r\n\r\n    # Latency percentiles\r\n    lines.append(\"## Latency Percentiles (parsed HTTP/gRPC)\")\r\n    lines.append(\"\")\r\n    lp = summary.latency_percentiles\r\n    lines.append(f\"- **p50:** {lp.p50_ms:.2f} ms\" if lp.p50_ms is not None else \"- **p50:** N/A\")\r\n    lines.append(f\"- **p90:** {lp.p90_ms:.2f} ms\" if lp.p90_ms is not None else \"- **p90:** N/A\")\r\n    lines.append(f\"- **p99:** {lp.p99_ms:.2f} ms\" if lp.p99_ms is not None else \"- **p99:** N/A\")\r\n    lines.append(\"\")\r\n\r\n    # Top talkers\r\n    lines.append(\"## Top Talkers\")\r\n    lines.append(\"\")\r\n    lines.append(\"| IP | Bytes Sent | Bytes Recv |\")\r\n    lines.append(\"|----|------------|------------|\")\r\n    for t in summary.top_talkers:\r\n        lines.append(f\"| {t.ip} | {t.bytes_sent} | {t.bytes_recv} |\")\r\n    lines.append(\"\")\r\n\r\n    # Top destinations\r\n    lines.append(\"## Top Destinations\")\r\n    lines.append(\"\")\r\n    lines.append(\"| Target | Bytes Sent | Flow Count |\")\r\n    lines.append(\"|--------|------------|------------|\")\r\n    for d in summary.top_destinations:\r\n        lines.append(f\"| {d.target} | {d.bytes_sent} | {d.flow_count} |\")\r\n    lines.append(\"\")\r\n\r\n    # Behavior profile\r\n    lines.append(\"## Behavior Profile\")\r\n    lines.append(\"\")\r\n    if summary.active_flow_peaks > 1:\r\n        lines.append(f\"- **Burstiness:** Peak concurrency of {summary.active_flow_peaks} simultaneous flows.\")\r\n    if summary.top_talkers:\r\n        top = summary.top_talkers[0]\r\n        total = top.bytes_sent + top.bytes_recv\r\n        if summary.total_bytes > 0:\r\n            pct = 100.0 * total / summary.total_bytes\r\n            lines.append(f\"- **Heavy endpoint:** Top talker {top.ip} accounts for {pct:.1f}% of traffic.\")\r\n    if lp.p99_ms is not None and lp.p50_ms is not None and lp.p50_ms > 0:\r\n        ratio = lp.p99_ms / lp.p50_ms\r\n        if ratio > 2:\r\n            lines.append(f\"- **Long-tail latency:** p99/p50 ratio is {ratio:.1f}x; some requests have high latency.\")\r\n    lines.append(\"\")\r\n    return \"\\n\".join(lines)\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "9881160eefc0f381af59139f8d941fa568da31ee3a3426817b329a131937bd9f",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Build summary.json from flows and transactions.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom collections import defaultdict\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.models.flow import Flow\r\nfrom netprof.models.summary import (\r\n    Summary,\r\n    TopTalker,\r\n    TopDestination,\r\n    LatencyPercentiles,\r\n)\r\nfrom netprof.models.transaction import Transaction\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _percentile(sorted_values: list[float], p: float) -> float | None:\r\n    if not sorted_values:\r\n        return None\r\n    k = (len(sorted_values) - 1) * p / 100.0\r\n    f = int(k)\r\n    c = f + 1 if f + 1 < len(sorted_values) else f\r\n    return sorted_values[f] + (k - f) * (sorted_values[c] - sorted_values[f]) if c > f else sorted_values[f]\r\n\r\n\r\ndef build_summary(\r\n    flows: list[Flow],\r\n    transactions: list[Transaction],\r\n    top_talkers_n: int = 10,\r\n    top_destinations_n: int = 10,\r\n    top_ports_n: int = 10,\r\n) -> Summary:\r\n    \"\"\"Compute aggregate stats from flows and transactions.\"\"\"\r\n    total_flows = len(flows)\r\n    total_bytes = sum(f.bytes_client_to_server + f.bytes_server_to_client for f in flows)\r\n    total_transactions = len(transactions)\r\n\r\n    # Top talkers: by IP, aggregate bytes sent/recv (as client or server)\r\n    ip_bytes_sent: dict[str, int] = defaultdict(int)\r\n    ip_bytes_recv: dict[str, int] = defaultdict(int)\r\n    for f in flows:\r\n        ip_bytes_sent[f.client_ip] += f.bytes_client_to_server\r\n        ip_bytes_recv[f.client_ip] += f.bytes_server_to_client\r\n        ip_bytes_sent[f.server_ip] += f.bytes_server_to_client\r\n        ip_bytes_recv[f.server_ip] += f.bytes_client_to_server\r\n    talkers = [\r\n        TopTalker(ip=ip, bytes_sent=ip_bytes_sent[ip], bytes_recv=ip_bytes_recv[ip])\r\n        for ip in sorted(set(ip_bytes_sent) | set(ip_bytes_recv))\r\n    ]\r\n    talkers.sort(key=lambda t: t.bytes_sent + t.bytes_recv, reverse=True)\r\n    top_talkers = talkers[:top_talkers_n]\r\n\r\n    # Top destinations: server endpoint (server_ip:port), bytes_sent to it, flow_count\r\n    dest_bytes: dict[str, int] = defaultdict(int)\r\n    dest_flows: dict[str, int] = defaultdict(int)\r\n    for f in flows:\r\n        key = f\"{f.server_ip}:{f.server_port}\"\r\n        dest_bytes[key] += f.bytes_client_to_server\r\n        dest_flows[key] += 1\r\n    dests = [\r\n        TopDestination(target=k, bytes_sent=dest_bytes[k], flow_count=dest_flows[k])\r\n        for k in sorted(dest_bytes.keys())\r\n    ]\r\n    dests.sort(key=lambda d: d.bytes_sent, reverse=True)\r\n    top_destinations = dests[:top_destinations_n]\r\n\r\n    # Top ports: destination port, count of flows\r\n    port_count: dict[int, int] = defaultdict(int)\r\n    for f in flows:\r\n        port_count[f.server_port] += 1\r\n    top_ports = [{\"port\": p, \"count\": port_count[p]} for p in sorted(port_count.keys(), key=lambda p: -port_count[p])[:top_ports_n]]\r\n\r\n    # Active flow peaks: max concurrent in any bucket\r\n    active_flow_peaks = 0\r\n    for f in flows:\r\n        if f.concurrency_timeline:\r\n            for _ts, count in f.concurrency_timeline:\r\n                if count > active_flow_peaks:\r\n                    active_flow_peaks = count\r\n\r\n    # Latency percentiles from transactions with latency_ms\r\n    latencies = [t.latency_ms for t in transactions if t.latency_ms is not None]\r\n    latencies.sort()\r\n    p50 = _percentile(latencies, 50)\r\n    p90 = _percentile(latencies, 90)\r\n    p99 = _percentile(latencies, 99)\r\n    latency_percentiles = LatencyPercentiles(p50_ms=p50, p90_ms=p90, p99_ms=p99)\r\n\r\n    return Summary(\r\n        total_flows=total_flows,\r\n        total_bytes=total_bytes,\r\n        total_transactions=total_transactions,\r\n        top_talkers=top_talkers,\r\n        top_destinations=top_destinations,\r\n        top_ports=top_ports,\r\n        active_flow_peaks=active_flow_peaks,\r\n        latency_percentiles=latency_percentiles,\r\n    )\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "6dd726a3980105472184a0a5a223f27e84e1b949c8a25595d868845dc5ed4a88",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    }
  ]
}
```

### RESPONSE ###
```
HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true
Access-Control-Expose-Headers: Grpc-Status\, Grpc-Message\, Grpc-Status-Details-Bin\, Content-Encoding\, Connect-Content-Encoding\, traceparent\, backend-traceparent\, x-amzn-trace-id\, x-request-id
Content-Type: application/proto
Date: Fri\, 06 Mar 2026 01:13:25 GMT
Vary: Origin
```

```
{
  "1:VARINT": 1
}
```

### SIGNATURE ###
```
http:host is localhost
http:method is POST
http:queryparams is -NONE-
http:requestBodyJSON is {"1:LEN": {"1:I64": 4845634861506629183}, "2:LEN": "REDACTED", "6:VARINT": 4, "7:LEN": [{"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "\"\"\"gRPC detection over HTTP/2: content-type application/grpc, :path, message framing.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nimport struct\r\nfrom typing import Any\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.correlation import compute_txn_id_http2\r\nfrom netprof.models.transaction import Transaction\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.base import ProtocolHandler, ts_at_offset\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.http2 import (\r\n    HTTP2_CLIENT_PREFACE,\r\n    PREFACE_LEN,\r\n    FRAME_HEADERS,\r\n    FRAME_DATA,\r\n    _parse_frames,\r\n    _decode_header_block,\r\n)\r\n\r\nGRPC_CONTENT_TYPE = \"application/grpc\"\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _parse_grpc_path(path: str) -> tuple[str | None, str | None]:\r\n    \"\"\"Extract service and method from :path like /package.Service/Method.\"\"\"\r\n    if not path or not path.startswith(\"/\"):\r\n        return (None, None)\r\n    path = path[1:]\r\n    if \"/\" not in path:\r\n        return (None, None)\r\n    service, method = path.rsplit(\"/\", 1)\r\n    return (service or None, method or None)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _parse_grpc_message_sizes(data: bytes) -> list[int]:\r\n    \"\"\"Extract message sizes from gRPC length-prefixed framing (1 byte compressed + 4 byte length).\"\"\"\r\n    sizes = []\r\n    offset = 0\r\n    while offset + 5 <= len(data):\r\n        compressed = data[offset]\r\n        length = struct.unpack(\">I\", data[offset + 1 : offset + 5])[0]\r\n        sizes.append(length)\r\n        offset += 5 + length\r\n        if offset > len(data):\r\n            break\r\n    return sizes\r\n\r\n\r\nclass GrpcHandler(ProtocolHandler):\r\n    \"\"\"Detect gRPC over HTTP/2 and extract RPC identity and message sizes.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    @property\r\n    def name(self) -> str:\r\n        return \"grpc\"\r\n\r\n    def detect(self, c2s_bytes: bytes, s2c_bytes: bytes) -> bool:\r\n        if c2s_bytes[:PREFACE_LEN] != HTTP2_CLIENT_PREFACE:\r\n            return False\r\n        c2s_frames = _parse_frames(c2s_bytes[PREFACE_LEN:], base_offset=PREFACE_LEN)\r\n        for _sid, ft, frame, _off in c2s_frames:\r\n            if ft == FRAME_HEADERS:\r\n                block = getattr(frame, \"data\", b\"\")\r\n                headers = _decode_header_block(block)\r\n                ct = (headers.get(\"content-type\") or \"\").lower()\r\n                if GRPC_CONTENT_TYPE in ct:\r\n                    return True\r\n        return False\r\n\r\n    def parse(\r\n        self,\r\n        c2s_bytes: bytes,\r\n        s2c_bytes: bytes,\r\n        flow_id: str,\r\n        c2s_ts_map: list[tuple[int, float]],\r\n        s2c_ts_map: list[tuple[int, float]],\r\n    ) -> list[Transaction]:\r\n        if not self.detect(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes):\r\n            return []\r\n        c2s_frames = _parse_frames(c2s_bytes[PREFACE_LEN:], base_offset=PREFACE_LEN)\r\n        s2c_frames = _parse_frames(s2c_bytes, base_offset=0)\r\n        request_by_stream: dict[int, dict[str, Any]] = {}\r\n        response_by_stream: dict[int, dict[str, Any]] = {}\r\n        bytes_c2s_by_stream: dict[int, int] = {}\r\n        bytes_s2c_by_stream: dict[int, int] = {}\r\n        message_sizes_by_stream: dict[int, list[int]] = {}\r\n        for stream_id, ft, frame, offset in c2s_frames:\r\n            if ft == FRAME_HEADERS and stream_id != 0:\r\n                block = getattr(frame, \"data\", b\"\")\r\n                headers = _decode_header_block(block)\r\n                ct = (headers.get(\"content-type\") or \"\").lower()\r\n                if GRPC_CONTENT_TYPE not in ct:\r\n                    continue\r\n                path = headers.get(\":path\") or headers.get(\"path\") or \"\"\r\n                service, method = _parse_grpc_path(path)\r\n                request_by_stream[stream_id] = {\r\n                    \"offset\": offset,\r\n                    \"method\": headers.get(\":method\"),\r\n                    \"path\": path,\r\n                    \"authority\": headers.get(\":authority\"),\r\n                    \"service\": service,\r\n                    \"method\": method,\r\n                }\r\n            elif ft == FRAME_DATA:\r\n                data = getattr(frame, \"data\", b\"\")\r\n                bytes_c2s_by_stream[stream_id] = bytes_c2s_by_stream.get(stream_id, 0) + len(data)\r\n                sizes = _parse_grpc_message_sizes(data)\r\n                message_sizes_by_stream.setdefault(stream_id, []).extend(sizes)\r\n        for stream_id, ft, frame, offset in s2c_frames:\r\n            if ft == FRAME_HEADERS and stream_id != 0:\r\n                block = getattr(frame, \"data\", b\"\")\r\n                headers = _decode_header_block(block)\r\n                ct = (headers.get(\"content-type\") or \"\").lower()\r\n                if GRPC_CONTENT_TYPE not in ct:\r\n                    continue\r\n                path = headers.get(\":path\") or \"\"\r\n                service, method = _parse_grpc_path(path)\r\n                try:\r\n                    status_code = int(headers.get(\":status\") or headers.get(\"status\", \"0\"))\r\n                except ValueError:\r\n                    status_code = None\r\n                response_by_stream[stream_id] = {\r\n                    \"offset\": offset,\r\n                    \"status_code\": status_code,\r\n                    \"service\": service,\r\n                    \"method\": method,\r\n                }\r\n            elif ft == FRAME_DATA:\r\n                data = getattr(frame, \"data\", b\"\")\r\n                bytes_s2c_by_stream[stream_id] = bytes_s2c_by_stream.get(stream_id, 0) + len(data)\r\n                sizes = _parse_grpc_message_sizes(data)\r\n                message_sizes_by_stream.setdefault(stream_id, []).extend(sizes)\r\n        transactions = []\r\n        for stream_id in sorted(set(request_by_stream) | set(response_by_stream)):\r\n            if stream_id == 0:\r\n                continue\r\n            req = request_by_stream.get(stream_id, {})\r\n            resp = response_by_stream.get(stream_id, {})\r\n            service = req.get(\"service\") or resp.get(\"service\")\r\n            method = req.get(\"method\") or resp.get(\"method\")\r\n            req_offset = req.get(\"offset\", 0)\r\n            resp_offset = resp.get(\"offset\", 0)\r\n            request_ts = ts_at_offset(req_offset, c2s_ts_map)\r\n            response_ts = ts_at_offset(resp_offset, s2c_ts_map)\r\n            latency_ms = None\r\n            if request_ts is not None and response_ts is not None:\r\n                latency_ms = (response_ts - request_ts) * 1000.0\r\n            txn_id = compute_txn_id_http2(flow_id, stream_id)\r\n            transactions.append(\r\n                Transaction(\r\n                    txn_id=txn_id,\r\n                    flow_id=flow_id,\r\n                    protocol=\"grpc\",\r\n                    method=req.get(\"method\"),\r\n                    authority=req.get(\"authority\"),\r\n                    path=req.get(\"path\"),\r\n                    status_code=resp.get(\"status_code\"),\r\n                    stream_id=stream_id,\r\n                    request_ts=request_ts,\r\n                    response_ts=response_ts,\r\n                    end_ts=response_ts,\r\n                    latency_ms=latency_ms,\r\n                    request_bytes=bytes_c2s_by_stream.get(stream_id, 0),\r\n                    response_bytes=bytes_s2c_by_stream.get(stream_id, 0),\r\n                    grpc_service=service,\r\n                    grpc_method=method,\r\n                    message_sizes=message_sizes_by_stream.get(stream_id),\r\n                )\r\n            )\r\n        return transactions\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "f482c60bc59c72bb2c701e5201594dd3f03275b9a4d6c56635e7633fa6d04863", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Centralized error logging to errors.log in output directory.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\nfrom typing import TextIO\r\n\r\n\r\nclass ErrorLogger:\r\n    \"\"\"Append parse errors and warnings to errors.log.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    def __init__(self, output_dir: Path) -> None:\r\n        self._output_dir = Path(output_dir)\r\n        self._file: TextIO | None = None\r\n\r\n    def _ensure_open(self) -> TextIO:\r\n        if self._file is None:\r\n            path = self._output_dir / \"errors.log\"\r\n            self._file = open(path, \"a\", encoding=\"utf-8\")\r\n        return self._file\r\n\r\n    def log(self, message: str, flow_id: str | None = None, detail: str | None = None) -> None:\r\n        line = message\r\n        if flow_id:\r\n            line += f\" [flow_id={flow_id}]\"\r\n        if detail:\r\n            line += f\" {detail}\"\r\n        self._ensure_open().write(line.rstrip() + \"\\n\")\r\n        self._ensure_open().flush()\r\n\r\n    def close(self) -> None:\r\n        if self._file is not None:\r\n            self._file.close()\r\n            self._file = None\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "bf246c4e416fd9831953aa34af2283924ec99c7acd7779c4cb29829d1cf1f53d", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Generate human-readable profile.md report.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.models.summary import Summary\r\nfrom netprof.models.transaction import Transaction\r\n\r\n\r\ndef build_profile_md(summary: Summary, transactions: list[Transaction]) -> str:\r\n    \"\"\"Build markdown report with overview, tables, and behavior profile.\"\"\"\r\n    lines = [\"# Network Behavior Profile\", \"\"]\r\n\r\n    # Overview\r\n    lines.append(\"## Overview\")\r\n    lines.append(\"\")\r\n    lines.append(f\"- **Total flows:** {summary.total_flows}\")\r\n    lines.append(f\"- **Total bytes:** {summary.total_bytes}\")\r\n    lines.append(f\"- **Parsed transactions (HTTP/gRPC):** {summary.total_transactions}\")\r\n    lines.append(f\"- **Active flow peak (concurrent):** {summary.active_flow_peaks}\")\r\n    lines.append(\"\")\r\n\r\n    # Top endpoints (from transactions: path + method)\r\n    if transactions:\r\n        endpoint_counts: dict[str, int] = {}\r\n        for t in transactions:\r\n            key = f\"{t.method or '?'} {t.path or '?'}\"\r\n            endpoint_counts[key] = endpoint_counts.get(key, 0) + 1\r\n        sorted_endpoints = sorted(endpoint_counts.items(), key=lambda x: -x[1])[:15]\r\n        lines.append(\"## Top Endpoints\")\r\n        lines.append(\"\")\r\n        lines.append(\"| Method | Path | Count |\")\r\n        lines.append(\"|--------|------|-------|\")\r\n        for (method_path, count) in sorted_endpoints:\r\n            parts = method_path.split(\" \", 1)\r\n            method = parts[0]\r\n            path = parts[1] if len(parts) > 1 else \"\"\r\n            lines.append(f\"| {method} | {path} | {count} |\")\r\n        lines.append(\"\")\r\n\r\n        # Status codes\r\n        status_counts: dict[int, int] = {}\r\n        for t in transactions:\r\n            if t.status_code is not None:\r\n                status_counts[t.status_code] = status_counts.get(t.status_code, 0) + 1\r\n        if status_counts:\r\n            lines.append(\"## Status Codes\")\r\n            lines.append(\"\")\r\n            lines.append(\"| Code | Count |\")\r\n            lines.append(\"|------|-------|\")\r\n            for code, count in sorted(status_counts.items(), key=lambda x: -x[1]):\r\n                lines.append(f\"| {code} | {count} |\")\r\n            lines.append(\"\")\r\n\r\n    # Latency percentiles\r\n    lines.append(\"## Latency Percentiles (parsed HTTP/gRPC)\")\r\n    lines.append(\"\")\r\n    lp = summary.latency_percentiles\r\n    lines.append(f\"- **p50:** {lp.p50_ms:.2f} ms\" if lp.p50_ms is not None else \"- **p50:** N/A\")\r\n    lines.append(f\"- **p90:** {lp.p90_ms:.2f} ms\" if lp.p90_ms is not None else \"- **p90:** N/A\")\r\n    lines.append(f\"- **p99:** {lp.p99_ms:.2f} ms\" if lp.p99_ms is not None else \"- **p99:** N/A\")\r\n    lines.append(\"\")\r\n\r\n    # Top talkers\r\n    lines.append(\"## Top Talkers\")\r\n    lines.append(\"\")\r\n    lines.append(\"| IP | Bytes Sent | Bytes Recv |\")\r\n    lines.append(\"|----|------------|------------|\")\r\n    for t in summary.top_talkers:\r\n        lines.append(f\"| {t.ip} | {t.bytes_sent} | {t.bytes_recv} |\")\r\n    lines.append(\"\")\r\n\r\n    # Top destinations\r\n    lines.append(\"## Top Destinations\")\r\n    lines.append(\"\")\r\n    lines.append(\"| Target | Bytes Sent | Flow Count |\")\r\n    lines.append(\"|--------|------------|------------|\")\r\n    for d in summary.top_destinations:\r\n        lines.append(f\"| {d.target} | {d.bytes_sent} | {d.flow_count} |\")\r\n    lines.append(\"\")\r\n\r\n    # Behavior profile\r\n    lines.append(\"## Behavior Profile\")\r\n    lines.append(\"\")\r\n    if summary.active_flow_peaks > 1:\r\n        lines.append(f\"- **Burstiness:** Peak concurrency of {summary.active_flow_peaks} simultaneous flows.\")\r\n    if summary.top_talkers:\r\n        top = summary.top_talkers[0]\r\n        total = top.bytes_sent + top.bytes_recv\r\n        if summary.total_bytes > 0:\r\n            pct = 100.0 * total / summary.total_bytes\r\n            lines.append(f\"- **Heavy endpoint:** Top talker {top.ip} accounts for {pct:.1f}% of traffic.\")\r\n    if lp.p99_ms is not None and lp.p50_ms is not None and lp.p50_ms > 0:\r\n        ratio = lp.p99_ms / lp.p50_ms\r\n        if ratio > 2:\r\n            lines.append(f\"- **Long-tail latency:** p99/p50 ratio is {ratio:.1f}x; some requests have high latency.\")\r\n    lines.append(\"\")\r\n    return \"\\n\".join(lines)\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "9881160eefc0f381af59139f8d941fa568da31ee3a3426817b329a131937bd9f", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "\"\"\"Build summary.json from flows and transactions.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom collections import defaultdict\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.models.flow import Flow\r\nfrom netprof.models.summary import (\r\n    Summary,\r\n    TopTalker,\r\n    TopDestination,\r\n    LatencyPercentiles,\r\n)\r\nfrom netprof.models.transaction import Transaction\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _percentile(sorted_values: list[float], p: float) -> float | None:\r\n    if not sorted_values:\r\n        return None\r\n    k = (len(sorted_values) - 1) * p / 100.0\r\n    f = int(k)\r\n    c = f + 1 if f + 1 < len(sorted_values) else f\r\n    return sorted_values[f] + (k - f) * (sorted_values[c] - sorted_values[f]) if c > f else sorted_values[f]\r\n\r\n\r\ndef build_summary(\r\n    flows: list[Flow],\r\n    transactions: list[Transaction],\r\n    top_talkers_n: int = 10,\r\n    top_destinations_n: int = 10,\r\n    top_ports_n: int = 10,\r\n) -> Summary:\r\n    \"\"\"Compute aggregate stats from flows and transactions.\"\"\"\r\n    total_flows = len(flows)\r\n    total_bytes = sum(f.bytes_client_to_server + f.bytes_server_to_client for f in flows)\r\n    total_transactions = len(transactions)\r\n\r\n    # Top talkers: by IP, aggregate bytes sent/recv (as client or server)\r\n    ip_bytes_sent: dict[str, int] = defaultdict(int)\r\n    ip_bytes_recv: dict[str, int] = defaultdict(int)\r\n    for f in flows:\r\n        ip_bytes_sent[f.client_ip] += f.bytes_client_to_server\r\n        ip_bytes_recv[f.client_ip] += f.bytes_server_to_client\r\n        ip_bytes_sent[f.server_ip] += f.bytes_server_to_client\r\n        ip_bytes_recv[f.server_ip] += f.bytes_client_to_server\r\n    talkers = [\r\n        TopTalker(ip=ip, bytes_sent=ip_bytes_sent[ip], bytes_recv=ip_bytes_recv[ip])\r\n        for ip in sorted(set(ip_bytes_sent) | set(ip_bytes_recv))\r\n    ]\r\n    talkers.sort(key=lambda t: t.bytes_sent + t.bytes_recv, reverse=True)\r\n    top_talkers = talkers[:top_talkers_n]\r\n\r\n    # Top destinations: server endpoint (server_ip:port), bytes_sent to it, flow_count\r\n    dest_bytes: dict[str, int] = defaultdict(int)\r\n    dest_flows: dict[str, int] = defaultdict(int)\r\n    for f in flows:\r\n        key = f\"{f.server_ip}:{f.server_port}\"\r\n        dest_bytes[key] += f.bytes_client_to_server\r\n        dest_flows[key] += 1\r\n    dests = [\r\n        TopDestination(target=k, bytes_sent=dest_bytes[k], flow_count=dest_flows[k])\r\n        for k in sorted(dest_bytes.keys())\r\n    ]\r\n    dests.sort(key=lambda d: d.bytes_sent, reverse=True)\r\n    top_destinations = dests[:top_destinations_n]\r\n\r\n    # Top ports: destination port, count of flows\r\n    port_count: dict[int, int] = defaultdict(int)\r\n    for f in flows:\r\n        port_count[f.server_port] += 1\r\n    top_ports = [{\"port\": p, \"count\": port_count[p]} for p in sorted(port_count.keys(), key=lambda p: -port_count[p])[:top_ports_n]]\r\n\r\n    # Active flow peaks: max concurrent in any bucket\r\n    active_flow_peaks = 0\r\n    for f in flows:\r\n        if f.concurrency_timeline:\r\n            for _ts, count in f.concurrency_timeline:\r\n                if count > active_flow_peaks:\r\n                    active_flow_peaks = count\r\n\r\n    # Latency percentiles from transactions with latency_ms\r\n    latencies = [t.latency_ms for t in transactions if t.latency_ms is not None]\r\n    latencies.sort()\r\n    p50 = _percentile(latencies, 50)\r\n    p90 = _percentile(latencies, 90)\r\n    p99 = _percentile(latencies, 99)\r\n    latency_percentiles = LatencyPercentiles(p50_ms=p50, p90_ms=p90, p99_ms=p99)\r\n\r\n    return Summary(\r\n        total_flows=total_flows,\r\n        total_bytes=total_bytes,\r\n        total_transactions=total_transactions,\r\n        top_talkers=top_talkers,\r\n        top_destinations=top_destinations,\r\n        top_ports=top_ports,\r\n        active_flow_peaks=active_flow_peaks,\r\n        latency_percentiles=latency_percentiles,\r\n    )\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "6dd726a3980105472184a0a5a223f27e84e1b949c8a25595d868845dc5ed4a88", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}]}
http:url is /aiserver.v1.RepositoryService/FastUpdateFileV2
```
